basicDetails.implementingAgency: Secondary Education Department, Government Of Uttarakhand

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and encouraging them through rewards.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Maths Wizard & Spelling Genius” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and by encouraging students through rewards.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English, the Government of India organized the “Maths Wizard” and “Spelling Genius” competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels under AWP-B for the year 2023-24, wherein participating students were encouraged through rewards.

children.text: The scheme “Maths Wizard & Spelling Genius” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and by encouraging students through rewards.

Under this scheme, to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English, the Government of India organized the “Maths Wizard” and “Spelling Genius” competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels under AWP-B for the year 2023-24, wherein participating students were encouraged through rewards.
The selection of beneficiaries for first, second, and third positions is done through school, block, district, and state-level competitions.

applicationProcess.process_md: The selection of beneficiaries for first, second, and third positions is done through school, block, district, and state-level competitions.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a Class 5 student of a government school in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The applicant must be a Class 5 student of a government school in Uttarakhand.
